headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Stock After 366% Five-Year Run Is There Value Left?
summary: With Marathon Petroleum trading at US$253.56, many investors are asking the same question: is the stock pricing in too much optimism, or is there still value on the table? The share price performance is strong, with returns of 4.4% over 7 days, 2.2% over 30 days, 53.5% year to date, 54.3% over 1 year, 131.8% over 3 years, and 366.0% over 5 years, which naturally raises questions about what is already embedded in the price. Recent news coverage has focused on Marathon Petroleum's position...
